case_title: TIZIANA COSTAMAGNA VS. DORSIA PROVISIONS INC.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUN-22-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-11-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT DORSIA PROVISIONS INC. TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT COSTAMAGNA, TIZIANA PLAINTIFF SHOULD RECOVER MONIES FROM THE ORIGINAL SELLER OF THE PRODUCTS WHO WAS UNABLE TO DELIVER THOSE PRODUCTS, IE. FROM UN PO PAZZO. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN PATRICK MAUZ, OWNER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: HON. GARRETT L. WONG; CLERKS: K. SEPTIEN AND L. BARENG. NOT REPORTED. (D504)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2023 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $59. SERVED JUN-29-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DORSIA PROVISIONS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2023 - CONTINUED TO TRANSFER FORTHWITH ON AUG-09-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 504. DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF TIZIANA COSTAMAGNA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DORISIA PROVISIONS INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN PATRICK MAUZ, OWNER. DECLARATION ON FILE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE . NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

TURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE AUG-22-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-19-2023 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 611

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-09-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TIZIANA COSTAMAGNA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DORSIA PROVISIONS INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN PATRICK MAUZ, OWNER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF PROVIDED THE COURT WITH PROOFS OF SERVICE FOR ALL THREE CASES: RELATED CASES: CSM-23-866821, & CSM-866904. DEFENDANT, CAME TO COURT 15 MINUTES LATE, INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE WAS ONLY AWARE OF 2 CASES AND PROVIDED COPIES OF CLAIMS FOR CASES CSM- 23-866821 & CSM-23-866904. CASE CSM-23-866904 HAD A SCRIVENER'S ERROR WITH THE SAME PLAINTIFF'S NAME AS THIS CASE, CSM-23-866706. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE ISSUES AND REQUESTED THAT HE BE PROPERLY SERVED IN THIS CASE. ***DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM*** NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2023 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HON. GARRETT L. WONG; CLERKS: K. SEPTIEN AND L. BARENG. NOT REPORTED. (D504)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COSTAMAGNA, TIZIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DORSIA PROVISIONS INC. $3,328.49 PRINCIPAL, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,437.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Set For Trial On Oct-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant, the moving party, Justin Mauz, on behalf of Dorsia Provisions Inc., appears in Pro Per.
Respondent/Plaintiff, the opposing party, Tiziana Costamagna appears in Pro Per.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties are sworn.

Respondent/Plaintiff, Tiziana Costamagna, submits a signed declaration for address change.
Appellant/Defendant, Justin Mauz, on behalf of Dorsia Provisions Inc., requests to continue the matter. The Court denies the request.

Respondent/Plaintiff, Tiziana Costamagna, testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - A Screenshot of Venmo Payments (on Tiziana Costamagna's cell phone) - reviewed by the opposing party and the Court; not retained.

Appellant/Defendant, Justin Mauz, on behalf of Dorsia Provisions Inc., testifies on his own behalf. No documentary evidence is introduced.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. No documentary evidence is retained. Judge: Honorable Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: C. Cheng; Reporter: Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Assigned. (D611)
